composition_pattern: internal-page-removal -> page-reorder -> correction-log-application -> public-table-rebuild -> header-band-style-migration -> metadata-cleanup
user_task_description: Prepare a clean public stormwater compliance report from a messy internal annual-review PDF.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove internal pages, reorder public sections, apply correction-log fixes, rebuild public tables, apply explicit color-coded header bands, footer text, page numbering, and public PDF metadata.
atomic_scope: Only the requested PDF-wide workflow edits are in scope; public compliance facts, correction facts, page order, style bands, footers, page numbering, and metadata must be preserved.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf artifact that completes the requested single-PDF workflow.

verifier_expectations.footer: Riverbend Public Stormwater Report | Permit Year 2026
